description_long: This fax machine features a compact, rectangular body with rounded edges and a predominantly light gray exterior. The front panel includes a dark gray paper output tray and a control panel with a small display screen, several buttons, and indicator lights, all arranged on the right side. The top of the machine has a slanted paper input tray, which is black and slightly elevated, designed to hold multiple sheets. Both sides of the machine are smooth, with subtle blue-gray panels that add visual contrast. The rear of the device is solid and dark, likely housing internal components and connections. The overall design is functional and modern, suitable for placement in offices, shops, or urban service centers.
description: A compact, light gray fax machine with a dark output tray, a right-side control panel, and a slanted black paper input tray on top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dark gray output tray, right-side control panel with display and buttons, and the slanted black paper input tray on top.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the blue-gray side panel and the angled paper input tray extending from the top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a solid, dark back panel with no visible controls or trays.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the blue-gray panel and the slanted paper input tray.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located on the front right side, featuring a small rectangular LCD screen at the top, with several round and rectangular buttons arranged below it in a grid. There are also indicator lights adjacent to the buttons, all grouped compactly for easy access.
attribute_paper_tray_design: The paper tray is positioned at the top rear, slanted upward, and is black in color. It appears to be able to hold a moderate stack of paper and has no visible adjustable guides or covers.
attribute_output_slot_location: The output slot is located at the front center, just above the dark gray output tray, allowing paper to emerge directly toward the user.
attribute_handset_attachment: No telephone handset is visibly present or attached to the device.
